Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There is a simple desk. On the[n]desk is a cardboard box.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I found a familiar-looking[n]envelope inside the drawer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Inside the envelope is[n]a single piece of paper...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a document with the[n]following written on it:[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It appears to be the school reinstatement[n]form Mitsuru asked me to give him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The date and reason are blank,[n]but there is a signature that[n]looks like Aragaki's handwriting...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There is a simple desk. It seems to[n]be the one provided by the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
